liberty.summary:
Liberty Classical Update - May 24, 2026
Last week of school! May 26-29

ACTION ITEMS
- MS Music Form (Jameson) - Due May 29 (choir or band choice for middle school): forms.gle/GvPJKKPoWVU4o52C8
- FACTS Payment - $154.55 auto-drafts 5/29 (April lunch, both boys)
- Football Meeting - Mon June 1, 7 PM, Liberty WBL gym (6th-12th grade boys, Jameson eligible)
- Summer Sports Camp - July 27-30, Liberty WBL (1st-5th grade, both boys eligible)

TEACHER NOTES
- Sullivan (Ms. Stasny, 3rd): Class concert Friday - Sullivan aka 'Big Tasty' sang a special song to teacher. Ms. Stasny says he made the year special. Videos sent to Kelly.
- Tuesday May 26 earned non-uniform day - Sullivan knows if he earned it.
- Jameson (5th): 5th Grade Graduation is Wed May 27, ~9:15 AM. Parents invited. Stand with your child as teachers pray over the class.

THIS WEEK
- Mon 5/25: No School (Memorial Day)
- Tue 5/26: Earned non-uniform day
- Wed 5/27: Awards 8:05 AM + Jameson's Graduation ~9:15 AM (parents invited, regular uniform)
- Thu 5/28: Track & Field 8:05-11:30 AM + Water Fun 12:30-2:10 PM. Sullivan's class: YELLOW shirt. Bring swimsuit, labeled towel, labeled water gun.
- Fri 5/29: Last Day of School + Picnic in the Park, West Park WBL, 12 PM ($5/meal via FACTS)

GENERAL
- New 6th Grade English teacher: Nancy Harris (Jameson's grade next year)
- Summer Reading Challenge coming June-August (America's 250th)
- Prayer: Korfe family lost unborn baby in car accident. Please pray for them.
